title: Milked Out Optimization
description: A modpack which will grant you a huge increase in FPS, and an overall better experience.
body:
This modpack was created to milk out the most of minecraft's performance as much as possible, while trying to sustain a stable gameplay.

**Forge version will be updated on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/milked-out-optimization)!**

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

The modpack includes the followings:

- Optifine resourcepack compatibility
- Shader support
- Faster loading times
- Faster in-game calculations
- Chunk loading/generation optimizations
- Entity/Particle rendering optimization
- AI optimizations
- TPS improvements
- Rewritten light engine
- Less RAM usage
- Bunch of client/server sided fixes
- Some QoL mods

The modpack is multiplayer compatible.

If you are having any issues or suggestions, feel free to add me on discord: t.alex936

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
